---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the ServiceNow.API module
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or need. For example: "I want to ... but the module
does not ..."

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen. If it maps to a ServiceNow REST API endpoint, please link the
relevant [API documentation](https://www.servicenow.com/docs/).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help.
